creator: crazyalexnt@inbox.ru
text:
This bug is the place to be to motherboard nForce chipset.

Copying process from usb stick or usb hdd stops at some time (10 - 50 seconds).

Please fix USB subsustem... :((((

Fix: 

Problem fix: turn off usb 2.0 in BIOS or hw.usb.ehci.no_hs=1. USB1.0 work slow, problem not found. :(

FreeBSD 7.2 worked normal, not problem.
How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD 8.0-RELEASE or 8.0-STABLE-201001 to motherboard nForce chipset.
Let GA-M56S-S3 or or any nForce430,560,630... Install mc. Mount usb stick and copy group files about 600Mb. Copying process but freeze.
